description:
A fantastic app to provide scroll lyrics for Spotify and other apps


1. [Fix] Optimize lyrics horizontal scrolling animation in Taskbar Lyrics.
2. [Fix] User profile page.
3. [Fix] Translation animation in Taskbar Lyrics.
4. [Add] Vertical adjustments for Taskbar Lyrics.
5. [Fix] Background performance when using Isolation in Apple Music Lyrics.
6. [Fix] Translation issue in QQ Music lyrics source.
7. [Add] Exception handling and automatic logout when non-Premium users use a custom API Client.
8. [Fix] Optimize QRC and Lyricify Syllable parser.
